title: Mulgedium cyaneum
intro: Mulgedium cyaneum, also known as Chinese blue spikenard or blue spikenard, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and infections. The bioactive constituents of Mulgedium cyaneum include alkaloids, flavonoids, and triterpenoids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. Mulgedium cyaneum is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often in traditional Chinese medicine and folk remedies.
